roadmap.title: Learn the route and build cumulative progress
roadmap.description: Complete standard expeditions across the rotating biome routes. Light every campfire, open luggage, cook items, place Pitons, collect Scrolls, and reach The Peak.

roadmap.title: Restriction and speed expeditions
roadmap.description: Use standard—not Custom—runs for the Heat, Cold, Spores, no-Injury, no-placement, no-unconsciousness, solo, natural-food, and one-hour badges.

roadmap.title: Food and Roots environmental cleanup
roadmap.description: Track one-expedition food sets, farm cumulative Poison and Fortified Milk progress, then handle Mandrake, Spider, and Zombie encounters in Roots.

roadmap.title: Co-op, rare items, and special encounters
roadmap.description: Coordinate revivals and healing, carry crash-site items, use rare mystical equipment, and finish Mesa, Scoutmaster, rope, flight, and mushroom-height challenges.

achievements.description: Reach the PEAK.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Complete a full standard expedition, reach The Peak, and escape alive.

guide.context: Awarded only to living Scouts who complete a full standard expedition.

steps.text: Climb every biome, lighting each campfire, then cross the Kiln and reach The Peak.
Enter the final escape to leave the island alive; the badge awards on escape.

achievements.description: Cook 20 meals at campfires.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Cook 20 total items across expeditions.

guide.context: Any item cooked at a campfire counts, even if the item is not edible.

steps.text: At a lit campfire, hold or place an item in the heat until its label changes to Cooked.
Cook 20 total items across expeditions; the twentieth completed cook triggers the badge.

achievements.description: Place 100m of rope in a single expedition.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Deploy 100 meters of rope during one expedition; eight full Rope Spools suffice.

guide.context: Deploy 100 meters of rope in one expedition; Rope Spools provide 12.5m and Rope Cannons provide 7.5m.

steps.text: Open luggage for Rope/Anti-Rope Spools and Cannons, keep them through the run, and deploy each onto valid terrain.
Place enough tools to reach 100 meters—eight full spools suffice—and the badge awards immediately.

achievements.description: Climb past the SHORE.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Reach the end of Shore alive and light its campfire.

guide.context: The Shore is the first biome of every standard expedition.

steps.text: Climb from the crash site to the Shore's final campfire while remaining alive.
Light the campfire; every living Scout receives the badge when the fire activates.

achievements.description: Have a friend escape the island without you.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Die fully before the final escape—not merely become unconscious—then remain in the group while the surviving friend escapes the island.

guide.context: This badge is awarded to dead players when another member of their group escapes.

steps.text: Join a co-op standard expedition and reach the late route with at least one capable teammate still alive.
Die fully before the final escape—not merely become unconscious—then remain in the group while the surviving friend escapes the island.

achievements.description: Climb past the TROPICS.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Reach the end of Tropics alive and light its campfire.

guide.context: Available when the daily standard route contains the Tropics.

steps.text: Climb through the Tropics to its upper campfire.
Remain alive and light the campfire to grant the badge to every living Scout.

achievements.description: Receive 5 Morale Boosts from campfires.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Receive five Morale Boosts across campfires.

guide.context: Morale Boosts are granted to living Scouts near a campfire when it is lit.

steps.text: Stay alive and within the campfire area whenever a teammate lights a biome-end fire.
Receive five Morale Boosts across campfires; the badge awards with the fifth boost.

achievements.description: Climb past the ALPINE.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Reach and light the Alpine's final campfire while alive.

guide.context: Available when the daily standard route contains the Alpine.

steps.text: Cross the Alpine while using warmth sources and safe ledges to control Cold.
Reach and light the Alpine's final campfire while alive.

achievements.description: Climb past the CALDERA.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Reach the end of Caldera alive and light its campfire.

guide.context: Caldera appears late in a full standard expedition.

steps.text: Climb the Caldera, avoiding lava and conserving tools for the steep upper route.
Light the campfire at the top while alive to receive the badge.

achievements.description: Place 10 pitons.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Place ten Pitons in total.

guide.context: Piton placements accumulate across expeditions.

steps.text: Find Pitons in luggage, equip one while climbing, aim at a valid rock surface, and place it.
Place ten Pitons in total; the badge awards immediately on the tenth placement.

achievements.description: Restore 200 total poison by using items.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Remove a cumulative 200 Poison with Antidotes, Cure-Alls, First Aid Kits, or Medicinal Roots.

guide.context: Restoring Poison with items accumulates across expeditions and healing another Scout credits the item user.

steps.text: Build Poison from safe sources, then directly use Antidote, Cure-All, First Aid Kit, or Medicinal Root to remove it from yourself or a teammate.
Restore 200 total Poison with qualifying items; the badge triggers as soon as the cumulative total is reached.

achievements.description: Eat 5 different berries in a single expedition.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Eat or feed all five Shroomberry colors during one Roots expedition.

guide.context: Five unique berry items must be consumed in one expedition; a Roots route supplies the complete set through Shroomberries.

steps.text: In Roots, find one Red, Yellow, Green, Blue, and Purple Shroomberry and keep a five-color checklist.
Eat or feed all five colors in the same expedition; feeding another Scout credits you and simultaneously advances Advanced Mycology.

achievements.description: Obtain a mystical item.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Collect a mystical item from Ancient Luggage or an Ancient Statue activated while every Scout is alive.

guide.context: Mystical items come from Ancient Luggage or an Ancient Statue used while every Scout is alive.

steps.text: Open Ancient Luggage, or reach a campfire Ancient Statue with no dead or unconscious Scout and activate it for a random mystical item.
Pick up the generated mystical item; the badge awards to the player who collects it.

achievements.description: Escape the island in a solo expedition.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Start and complete a standard expedition solo, then escape the island alive.

guide.context: The entire successful expedition must be started and completed solo.

steps.text: At the Airport, begin a standard expedition without inviting or joining other Scouts; Custom Runs do not award achievements.
Climb every biome and escape the island alive to receive the badge.

achievements.description: Resurrect 3 scouts in a single expedition.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Use Ancient Statues to revive three Scouts during one expedition.

guide.context: Three Scout revivals must be credited in one expedition; the same teammate may be revived repeatedly.

steps.text: In co-op, have a teammate become dead or unconscious before a biome-end Ancient Statue, then activate the statue to revive them.
Repeat at later unused Ancient Statues until you have revived three Scouts in the same run; the third revival awards the badge.

achievements.description: Escape the island without taking fall damage.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Escape the island alive with zero Injury received during the run.

guide.context: Despite the Steam wording, the current badge rejects any Injury—not only fall damage—during the full expedition.

steps.text: Start a standard run and avoid all sources of Injury, including falls, hostile attacks, trapped Ancient Luggage, Antlions, and Zombie bites.
Escape the island alive with zero Injury received during the run; resurrection does not repair an invalidated attempt.

achievements.description: Escape the island without placing anything on the mountain.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Escape alive without anyone placing a Checkpoint Flag, Portable Stove, Piton, Chain Launcher, Rope or Anti-Rope tool, or Scout Cannon.

guide.context: No player in the expedition may place a prohibited climbing or utility object on the mountain.

steps.text: Do not place a Checkpoint Flag, Portable Stove, Piton, Chain Launcher, Rope or Anti-Rope Spool, or either Rope/Anti-Rope Cannon; the Scout Cannon also invalidates the run.
You may still throw a Rescue Claw, Magic Bean, Cloud Fungus, or Shelf Fungus. Escape alive without any prohibited placement.

achievements.description: Escape the island in under an hour.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Reach The Peak and complete the escape at or before 1:00:00 to earn the badge.

guide.context: The timer permits exactly one hour, but the player must personally escape.

steps.text: Start a standard expedition, skip optional detours, divide essential tools in co-op, and keep moving between campfires.
Reach The Peak and complete the escape at or before 1:00:00 to earn the badge.

achievements.description: Help Bing Bong escape the island.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Escape while a living Scout carries Bing Bong in their inventory or Backpack.

guide.context: Bing Bong is guaranteed at the Shore crash site and must be carried to the final escape.

steps.text: Pick up the Bing Bong plush at the crash site and keep it in a living Scout's inventory or Backpack through every biome.
Escape the island while one living player still carries it; every group member, alive or dead, receives the badge.

achievements.description: Escape the island without eating any packaged food.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Escape the island alive without consuming or feeding packaged food at any point.

guide.context: Packaged food invalidates your attempt whether you eat it, another Scout feeds it to you, or you feed it to someone else.

steps.text: Use clearly natural foods such as berries, mushrooms, coconut halves, honeycomb, roots, and eggs; refuse uncertain food offered by teammates.
Escape the island alive without consuming or feeding packaged food at any point.

achievements.description: Escape the island after cooking and eating a coconut half, a honeycomb, a yellow winterberry, and an egg.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: In one expedition, cook an Egg, Yellow Winterberry, Honeycomb, and Half-Coconut; eat or feed all four for your own credit, then escape alive.

guide.context: One player must receive credit for all four cooked foods in the same expedition, then escape alive; feeding another Scout credits the feeder.

steps.text: Take a Coconut from palms in Shore, Tropics, or Mesa and break it for a Half-Coconut; break a Beehive on a Tropics tree for Honeycomb.
Pick a Yellow Winterberry from an Alpine tree or take the guaranteed one from a Capybara at the Alpine Hot Spring or Mesa Oasis; break a Caldera Big Egg for an Egg.
Cook each item at least once, eat or feed all four for your own credit, and complete the final escape alive.

achievements.description: Eat four different non-toxic mushrooms in a single expedition.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Eat or feed safe Chubby, Bugle, Button, and Cluster Shrooms during one expedition.

guide.context: Four different non-toxic mushroom species are required in one expedition; Shroomberries do not count and cooking cannot remove mushroom poison.

steps.text: On a Tropics route, search Shore and Tropics for a Chubby Shroom, a smooth non-ridged-stalk Bugle Shroom, an X-split-cap Button Shroom without spots, and an unskirted-stalk Cluster Shroom.
Eat or feed one safe example of all four species during the same expedition; feeding credits the feeder.

achievements.description: Heal your friends for 100 points of injury in a single expedition.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Directly use healing items to restore 100 Injury on teammates during one expedition.

guide.context: The healer—not the recipient—receives progress, and only direct item applications count.

steps.text: In co-op, let teammates accumulate Injury, then directly apply bandages, First Aid Kits, or other Injury-healing items to them.
Heal 100 total Injury in the same expedition; passive Faerie Lantern and Remedy Fungus healing does not count.

achievements.description: Escape the island without ever losing consciousness.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Escape the island alive without having lost consciousness at any point.

guide.context: Any loss of consciousness invalidates the run, even if the Scout never dies.

steps.text: Complete a standard expedition while keeping total afflictions below the unconscious threshold; heal early and avoid risky falls.
Escape the island alive without having lost consciousness at any point.

achievements.description: Play the bugle for a capybara.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Play a standard, Friendship, or Scoutmaster Bugle beside a Capybara at the Alpine Hot Spring or Mesa Oasis.

guide.context: Capybaras appear at the Alpine Hot Spring and Mesa Oasis; standard, Friendship, and Scoutmaster Bugles qualify.

steps.text: Carry a Bugle from the Shore crash site or find a qualifying variant, then go to the Hot Spring in Alpine or the Oasis in Mesa and locate its Capybara.
Stand close to the animal, equip the Bugle, and play it; the badge triggers when the Capybara hears it.

achievements.description: Reach the top of a really big tree.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Climb to the largest bough of the oversized tree in Tropics.

guide.context: The required oversized tree appears in the Tropics.

steps.text: Locate the biome's largest tree, then climb its trunk, vines, and branches with enough stamina recovery for the upper section.
Reach the top of its largest bough; the badge triggers immediately.

achievements.description: Have a 1-on-1 with the Scoutmaster.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Get within 40 meters of an aggroed Scoutmaster while you are his target.

guide.context: The target player must approach within 40 meters of an aggroed Scoutmaster.

steps.text: For the controlled route, obtain Scoutmaster's Bugle from Ancient Luggage or an Ancient Statue used while all Scouts are alive, then play it to force his aggro onto you for two minutes.

For a natural spawn, keep two active Scouts in the run, stay below 1,320 meters, and lead the second-highest Scout by at least 160 meters; every 30 seconds, the qualifying spawn check has a 10% success chance.
Approach within 40 meters while you remain his target; the badge awards immediately, so retreat before his grab.

achievements.description: Heal an unconscious friend with an item to save them from death.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Use a direct healing item to revive an unconscious Scout before they die.

guide.context: A direct healing item must bring an unconscious friend's combined afflictions below 100.

steps.text: Have a teammate become unconscious in a safe area, approach with a strong direct healing item such as a First Aid Kit, and target the teammate.
Apply the item before death; if their total afflictions drop below 100 and they recover, the healer receives the badge.

achievements.description: Climb 5000m total.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Accumulate 5,000 meters of ascent to trigger the badge immediately.

guide.context: The 5,000-meter climbing total persists between expeditions.

steps.text: Complete normal climbs; vertical progress begins counting after 25 meters and is recorded in five-meter increments.
Accumulate 5,000 meters of ascent to trigger the badge immediately.

achievements.description: Open 15 luggages in a single expedition.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Open all 15 luggage containers yourself during one expedition.

guide.context: All 15 luggage openings must occur in one expedition and be performed by the same player.

steps.text: Search the Shore and each following biome for regular, large, and specialty luggage; open every container yourself.
Open your fifteenth luggage before the expedition ends to receive the badge immediately.

achievements.description: Read the Scoutmaster’s final journal entry.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Open campfire Scrolls until you read Scoutmaster Myres's fourth journal entry.

guide.context: Scrolls spawn randomly near campfires and always reveal the next missing journal entry for the opener.

steps.text: At every biome campfire, search the surrounding ground and props for a Scroll, then open it to read the page.
Open entries in sequence through journal 4; opening the final missing Scroll awards the badge.

achievements.description: Climb 50m upwards without touching the ground.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Climb upward continuously without touching terrain or a placed tool until the 50-meter mark triggers the badge.

guide.context: The Scout must gain 50 meters without touching ground or grabbing a Piton or climbing tool.

steps.text: Find a continuous route such as a long vine with more than 50 meters of vertical gain and start from its bottom.
Climb upward continuously without touching terrain or a placed tool until the 50-meter mark triggers the badge.

achievements.description: Climb past the MESA.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Reach and light the Mesa's final campfire while alive.

guide.context: Available when the daily standard route contains the Mesa.

steps.text: Cross the Mesa canyon route while controlling Heat.
Reach and light the Mesa's final campfire while alive.

achievements.description: Catch a Flying Disc from 100m away.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Catch or collect a Flying Disc after a throw of at least 100 meters.

guide.context: The Flying Disc is found only at the Shore crash site; the receiving player earns the badge by collecting it after a 100-meter throw.

steps.text: Pick up the Flying Disc at the crash, then place two Scouts at least 100 meters apart on open terrain such as Mesa.
Have one Scout throw at full power and the other catch or pick up the qualifying disc; swap roles if both players need the badge.

achievements.description: Climb past the MESA without ever having more than 10% Heat.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Keep Heat at or below 10% until the end and light the Mesa campfire while alive.

guide.context: Heat must never exceed 10% during the entire Mesa segment; lowering it afterward does not repair the run.

steps.text: Enter Mesa below the limit, travel at night or in shade, and use Parasol or Sunscreen before sunlight raises Heat.
Keep Heat at or below 10% until the end and light the Mesa campfire while alive.

achievements.description: Have a lot of cactuses stuck to you.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Attach the fifth Cactus to trigger the badge, then immediately pick the Cacti off yourself before dying.

guide.context: Five attached Cacti are required; a cactus merely held in hand does not count and the fifth causes unconsciousness.

steps.text: In Mesa, brush against or pick Cacti so they stick to your Scout and leave the first four attached.
Attach the fifth Cactus to trigger the badge, then immediately pick the Cacti off yourself before dying; a teammate may help but is not required.

achievements.description: Achieve flight.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Attach six Balloons to one Scout and make them float off the ground.

guide.context: Six attached Balloons are required; individual Balloons and Balloon Bunch contents can be combined.

steps.text: Collect Balloon items from luggage and attach all six to one Scout in a safe open area.
Once that Scout leaves the ground and floats, every living player receives the badge.

achievements.description: Offer The Kiln a worthy sacrifice.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Retrieve the Ancient Idol from the Mesa Tomb, carry it into the Kiln, and release it above the lava.

guide.context: The worthy sacrifice is the Ancient Idol hidden in the Mesa Tomb.

steps.text: In Mesa, enter the Tomb, complete its parkour route, and take the Ancient Idol from the final chamber.
Transport the Ancient Idol onward, then sacrifice it by releasing it over the Kiln's lava. Its destruction grants the badge to every living player.

achievements.description: Give in to your hunger.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: With Cannibalism disabled, eat the rare Cooked Bird found inside a Caldera Big Egg.

guide.context: A solo-friendly route uses a Cooked Bird while the Cannibalism option is disabled.

steps.text: Disable Cannibalism before the expedition, reach Caldera, and break Big Eggs until the rare Cooked Bird appears instead of an Egg.
Eat the Cooked Bird to satisfy the hunger condition and trigger the badge.

achievements.description: Shoot across the MESA canyon in a Scout Cannon.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Launch from the Mesa Scout Cannon and land inside the far-side target zone.

guide.context: The Scout Cannon and target landing zone appear at the Mesa canyon.

steps.text: Locate the Scout Cannon, position it at the near canyon edge, enter it, and aim across toward the marked target zone.
Fire and land inside the target zone on the far side; a qualifying landing awards the badge immediately.

achievements.description: Survive an Antlion attack.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Take damage from a Mesa Antlion, then escape its mound alive.

guide.context: Antlions occupy bowl-shaped sand mounds in Mesa; the player must be damaged and then escape alive.

steps.text: Enter an Antlion mound, allow its attack to deal damage, then jump and climb away or have a teammate pull you out.
Move far enough from the mound while still alive; the badge awards once the escape registers.

achievements.description: Look a little too closely at the blazing sun.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Use the Shore Binoculars to look directly at the sun in Mesa.

guide.context: This interaction requires the Binoculars found at the Shore crash site and a visible sun in Mesa.

steps.text: Pick up the Binoculars beside the crashed plane in Shore and keep them until Mesa, then equip them in direct sunlight and aim at the sun.
Keep the sun centered until the badge triggers.

achievements.description: Climb past the ALPINE without ever having more than 20% Cold.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Finish Alpine and light its campfire without Cold ever exceeding 20%.

guide.context: Cold must never exceed 20% during the entire Alpine segment.

steps.text: Enter Alpine below the limit, move between warmth sources, and use available Cold-removal items before the meter reaches 20%.
Light the Alpine campfire while alive without ever crossing the limit.

achievements.description: Climb past the ROOTS.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 1; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Reach the end of Roots alive and light its campfire.

guide.context: Available when the daily standard route contains the Roots.

steps.text: Climb through Roots while managing spores and hostile creatures.
Light the campfire at the top while alive; all living Scouts receive the badge.

achievements.description: Climb past the ROOTS without ever having more than 25% spores.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 2; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Finish Roots and light its campfire without Spores ever exceeding 25%.

guide.context: Spores must never exceed 25% during the entire Roots segment.

steps.text: Avoid dense spore clouds, keep distance from infected hazards, and use Medicinal Roots or other Spore-removal items before reaching 25%.
Light the Roots campfire while alive without ever crossing the limit.

achievements.description: Escape a spider's web and survive.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Escape a Roots Spider's web by pressing Jump until Web reaches zero.

guide.context: Spiders hang above routes in Roots and inflict Web when they grab a Scout.

steps.text: Walk beneath a Spider and allow it to web you while keeping enough stamina to escape the drop afterward.
Press Jump repeatedly; each press removes Web. Reach zero Web and survive the fall to receive the badge immediately.

achievements.description: Cure yourself from a zombie bite.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: On Peak difficulty or higher, let a Roots Zombie bite you at zero Spores, then remove all Spores.

guide.context: Zombies spawn in Roots only above Tenderfoot; the bite must occur while the player has zero Spores.

steps.text: On Peak difficulty or higher, enter Roots at zero Spores, let a Zombie's lunge bite and infect you, then create distance.
Remove all Spores with an appropriate item such as Medicinal Root, Antidote, or Cure-All; clearing the infection awards the badge.

achievements.description: Try all 5 types of Shroomberry in a single expedition.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Eat or feed all five Shroomberry colors during one Roots expedition.

guide.context: All five Shroomberry colors—red, yellow, green, blue, and purple—must be tried in one expedition.

steps.text: Search Roots for every Shroomberry color and keep a checklist; their randomized effects are consistent for that day's map.
Eat or feed each of the five colors in one run; feeding credits the feeder, and the fifth type awards the badge.

achievements.description: Pull an unconscious friend 30m with the Rescue Claw.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Use a Rescue Claw to pull an unconscious Scout at least 30 meters.

guide.context: The Rescue Claw is an Epic item from regular, big, or Explorer's luggage and can reach 48–64 meters.

steps.text: In co-op, stand more than 30 meters from a teammate, have them become unconscious in a safe line of sight, then aim the Rescue Claw at their body.
Fire and reel the unconscious Scout at least 30 meters; the claw user receives the badge.

achievements.description: Block 100 total damage with the Fortified Milk.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Use Fortified Milk to block 100 total damage across expeditions.

guide.context: Fortified Milk blocks afflictions other than Weight and Curse, and its blocked-damage total persists across expeditions.

steps.text: Find Fortified Milk in luggage, drink it to activate the protection, then take controlled Injury, Poison, Heat, Cold, or Spores while the effect is active.
Repeat with more milk until 100 total damage has been blocked; the badge awards immediately.

achievements.description: Eat 3 Hot Dogs in 5 seconds or less.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Eat three Hot Dogs within five seconds during one expedition.

guide.context: Each campfire has a 37.5% chance to spawn a Hot Dog instead of a Marshmallow.

steps.text: Save three Hot Dogs in your Backpack during one expedition, then move them into quick inventory slots while safe.
Eat all three within a five-second window; the third Hot Dog triggers the badge.

achievements.description: Resurrect a friend using unholy means.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Revive a dead Scout by aiming the Book of Bones at their skeleton and activating it.

guide.context: The Book of Bones is a mystical item found only in Ancient Luggage or from an Ancient Statue.

steps.text: Acquire the Book of Bones in co-op, then wait for a teammate to die and leave a skeleton.
Equip the book, aim at the dead Scout's skeleton, and use it to resurrect them; the book user receives the badge.

achievements.description: Bounce up 40m off a mushroom.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 4; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Bounce from a mushroom, then immediately gain 40 meters of height.

guide.context: After bouncing from any mushroom, the Scout must gain 40 meters of height.

steps.text: Find a bouncy mushroom below a long vine or chain, or prepare a Rescue Claw or Balloons for additional lift.
Bounce once, then immediately climb, grapple, or float upward until the 40-meter gain triggers the badge.

achievements.description: Cook and eat a Mandrake.
achievements.sortReason: Roadmap stage 3; pursue with the other tasks in this route.
achievements.summary: Cook a Roots Mandrake until it stops screaming, then eat it or have another Scout feed it to you.

guide.context: In Roots, an uprooted Medicinal Root has a 50% chance to be a Mandrake.

steps.text: Uproot Medicinal Roots until a Mandrake appears, carry it in a Backpack, and move it to a campfire despite its Drowsy-inducing screams.
Cook it until the screaming stops, then eat it or have it fed to you; the badge awards immediately.
